Episodes.Title: Pilot
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: A video of Audrey and Rachel kissing goes viral; Nina and her boyfriend Tyler are brutally murdered; Memories of a killing spree 20 years earlier haunts those affected, inspiring a new killer.

Episodes.Title: Hello, Emma.
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Another teenager's death raises questions, causing yet another rift between Emma and Audrey; Piper, a provocative podcaster comes to Lakewood to report on the town's murders.

Episodes.Title: Wanna Play a Game?
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Emma discovers that her mother is hiding a few secrets of her past and the killer challenges her to a dangerous game.

Episodes.Title: Aftermath
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Emma gets a mysterious message which leads her and Audrey in search of answers.

Episodes.Title: Exposed
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: When a scandalous video is leaked, Emma learns a heartbreaking secret.

Episodes.Title: Betrayed
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Emma learns that the latest prime suspect is someone close to her.

Episodes.Title: In the Trenches
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Emma tries to save a friend from the killer's dangerous game of hide and seek before time runs out.

Episodes.Title: Ghosts
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Emma is shaken by another death, and uncovers a secret from the past.

Episodes.Title: The Dance
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Mr. Branson is taken into custody, but Emma starts to suspect his innocence; Piper and Emma visit Brandon's mother; Brooke plans her Halloween after-party.

Episodes.Title: Revelations
Episodes.Writer: Jill E. Blotevogel, Dan Dworkin, Jay Beattie
Episodes.Actors: Willa Fitzgerald, Bex Taylor-Klaus, John Karna
Episodes.Plot: Jake, Audrey, and Kieran head to Brooke's after party; Noah and Emma race against time to try and save their friends; The killer is finally revealed.
